h1.visual_description: Bold, numbered (e.g., 1), left-aligned, with significant padding above.

h2.visual_description: Bold, hierarchical numbering (e.g., 1.1), left-aligned, slightly smaller than h1.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: In-text citation, typically rendered in blue hyperlinked text.
Vertical arXiv metadata watermark located in the left margin.
Footnote content located at the bottom of the page, separated by a horizontal rule.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Vertical text in the left margin (arXiv stamp); page-bottom footnotes.
